howItWorks.intro: This frost depth calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Frost Depth
rules.formula: Depth = (32 - Avg Temp) × 1.5 × Snow × Soil factors
rules.explanation: Simplified estimation based on temperature and conditions.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: Foundations and pipes must be below the frost line to prevent heaving and freezing.

faq.q: What is the frost line in my area?
faq.a: Ranges from 0 in the South to 72+ inches in northern states. Check local building codes.

howWeCalculate.intro: This frost depth calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
